chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 2242 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Nasrullah Unar, advocate for petitioners Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. Learned counsel for petitioners submits that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners and shall provide legal protection to the petitioners. Learned A.A.G. present in court gives such an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners, shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide legal protection to the petitioners as is provided to the other citizens of this country. In view of above undertaking of learned A.A.G., learned counsel for petitioners does not press the instant petition which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
